mapper.insert: INSERT INTO membership_subscription ( user_id, source, payment_order_id, tier, duration_months, previous_end_at, new_end_at, amount_cent, channel, external_trade_no, remark, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{durationMonths,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{previousEndAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{newEndAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{amountCent,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{channel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{externalTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, source, payment_order_id, tier, duration_months, previous_end_at, new_end_at, amount_cent, channel, external_trade_no, remark, create_time FROM membership_subscription WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId,jdbcType=BIGINT} LIMIT 1
